immediateActions.title: Stop servicing activity and secure hazardous energy exposure
immediateActions.description: Pause affected work, establish control of hazardous energy, and keep workers clear until a qualified person verifies the equipment cannot unexpectedly start or release stored energy.
immediateActions.verificationMethod: Supervisor field verification and worker access review.

interimControls.title: Maintain interim exposure controls
interimControls.description: Use controlled access and temporary energy-control oversight until the permanent isolation method is verified.
interimControls.verificationMethod: Document interim control placement and responsible person review.

permanentCorrectiveActions.title: Complete permanent corrective action
permanentCorrectiveActions.description: Implement and document energy isolation, lockout/tagout, try-out verification, and restart controls appropriate to the equipment and task.
permanentCorrectiveActions.verificationMethod: Qualified review, closeout evidence, and recurrence-prevention verification.

verificationActions.title: Verify correction before closure
verificationActions.description: Verify isolation records, lock placement, try-out results, stored-energy release, and supervisor review before returning equipment to service.
verificationActions.verificationMethod: Verify isolation records, lock placement, try-out results, stored-energy release, and supervisor review before returning equipment to service.

assignedReviewNeeds: Qualified safety review is required before final reliance or closure.
dca.actionRationale: Action strength strong was selected from output policy and confidence governance. Actions are tied to mechanism unexpected_startup, failed/missing control guarding, energy_isolation, and exposure worker exposure identified; proximity=unknown. Credible worst case considered: amputation, crushing injury, entanglement, or fatality from unexpected hazardous energy release. All actions remain advisory and require qualified review.

correctiveActionReasoning.immediateActionNarrative: Halt all operations in the affected area immediately and initiate emergency energy isolation procedures.
correctiveActionReasoning.interimControlNarrative: Deploy temporary physical safeguards or implement strict access restrictions until permanent engineered controls are validated.
correctiveActionReasoning.permanentCorrectionNarrative: Implement permanent engineered controls, such as guard missing or no LOTO, to eliminate exposure to rotating_equipment_nip_point.
correctiveActionReasoning.administrativeFollowUpNarrative: Review and update the hazard control plan; conduct a mandatory safety briefing for all personnel affected by this work activity.
correctiveActionReasoning.verificationNarrative: Perform a formal inspection and functional verification by a competent person before removing interim controls or resuming normal operations.
